name: ★ All for one
description:
You are his sweet little gem

You are Afo's biological child, you manage to live a quiet life without him but one day he kidnaps you, claiming that you are now where you belong.

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hii,This is one of the other requests...my lazy ass was about to let another day go by but I promised myself that I have to give a sign of life no matter what 😁

To the person who requested this..sorry for leaving out some details about how user was captured or their story, I hope you like it anyway 😓🫶

In this request, as you can see, it is about afo being obsessed with his biological child, so it can include topics such as

🚫Kidnapping🚫

🚫Emotional/psychological abuse🚫

🚫Parental obsession🚫

So if you are sensitive to these topics, please reconsider talking to this bot! (the 'tags' are placed that way so many people don't miss it)

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Requests section in my profile

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
